node.html: I have over 6 years of work experience in DevOps methodologies, Cost Optimisation, CI/CD, Configuration Management, and Release Management. I have an expertise in collaborating with other engineers on code reviews, internal infrastructure improvements, and process enhancements. ALong with that I am proficient in developing automation scripts using Python and Shell scripts. Also I have strong troubleshooting skills to find out the root causes. I am well-versed in AWS, Linux operating system, Jenkins, TeamCity, and Python. And I am independent and self-motivated, with a track record of learning new technologies rapidly and going the extra mile to help others.

Hello All! I am a technology enthusiast and currently I am working as a Site Reliability Engineer III at Guidewire Software, Ireland. I have completed my Masters in Cloud Computing from the National College of Ireland, Dublin, Ireland. Before that I worked as a Technology Integration Engineer for 3 years at Amdocs, India. I can say that I got introduced to beginner level of programming in my 1st year at Terna Engineering College, Navi Mumbai where I completed my Bachelors in Computer Engineering (2014-2018).

I have 6+ years of experience in DevOps/SRE, specializing in CI/CD, automation, configuration management, and release orchestration. My work experince at Guidewire Software is highlighted in the Work Experience section.

I am an AWS Certified Developer - Associate - 2025. More interestingly, I have completed my thesis titled "Benchmarking of Serverless and Real-Time Inferencing and Performance Analysis of CPU/GPU Instances for Deep Learning Workloads." In this research, I proposed a technique and architecture Using AWS SageMaker, AWS Lambda endpoints, a GPU-based instance endpoints, and S3 to analyze the model performance, inference performance for both serverless & real-time instances, and cost advantages over multiple Machine Learning GPU-instance types depending on the payload.

Here is a list of the technologies that I'm familiar with!

• Led automation and cost optimization projects using AWS, scripting, and orchestration tools, achieving a 41.6% reduction in RDS costs, 23.0% reduction in EC2 costs, and 20.9% reduction in other EC2-related costs, saving over $265,676 annually.
  • Built Python-based automation solutions for deployment, configuration, and patching, reducing manual efforts and enhancing system reliability.
  • Developed CI/CD pipelines in Jenkins and TeamCity, improving deployment speed and process efficiency.
  • Implemented infrastructure-as-code (Terraform/Helm) to standardize multi-tenant provisioning and prevent configuration drift.
  • Defined SLIs/SLOs and error budgets; instrumented dashboards and alerts with Datadog to monitor adherence and prioritize customer-impactful work.
  • Created key automation tools, including:
    • Jira-to-Salesforce integration: saving ~15–20 minutes per case.
    • Google Sheets-to-Runbook-to-Jira workflow: saving ~10 hours weekly.
    • Automated pre-deployment workflow: saving 450 minutes every two weeks, equating to ~195 hours/year. ○ PR creation and update automation: saving 270 minutes every two weeks, equating to ~117 hours/year. ○ Bulk Jira ticket automation: saving 4 hours weekly, equating to ~208 hours/year.
    • Salesforce case creation from Jira: saving 3 hours weekly, equating to ~156 hours/year. ○ Automated cost reporting using Jenkins, providing leadership with real-time spend insights, enhancing decision-making.
  • Led incident response and postmortems, driving corrective actions and systemic reliability improvements, while maintaining comprehensive runbooks.
  • Mentored 11 team members in process automation and deployment best practices, and delivered automation projects for 4 distinct teams within the organisation, enhancing team efficiency and capability.

• Worked part-time to support my studies.
  • Ensured the IT Incidents and Service Requests are resolved within a given SLA. Resolving 20+ trouble tickets per day through efficient triaging of problems.
  • Applied solutions, workarounds, patches, and fixes. Error handling, monitoring, and logging with the help of the Splunk tool.
  • Maintained a 99% satisfaction rating in monthly end-user scoring through applied interpersonal skills and providing fast solutions.
  • First point of contact for SAP customers on the SAP Community Network application.
  • Highlighted all potential major incidents and problems to the respective service and problem managers.

• Skilled in ensuring to resolve identified issues related to the billing applications to the client.
  • Focused on automation, containerization, integration monitoring, and configuration management.
  • Developed and implemented software release management strategies for various applications according to the agile process.
  • Operated Kubernetes to orchestrate the deployment, scaling, and management of Docker containers. Created pods and managed using Kubernetes.
  • Actively worked on Docker and deploying and maintaining microservices in QA and Dev environments.
  • Created Ansible playbooks to deploy Virtual Machines and install the components as per requirements.
  • Applied scripting knowledge to automate the deployment and find out the number of configuration mistakes easily, kept an eye on every server for utilization, and improved time complexity.
  • Experienced in BOT Automation, operated for configuration and validation purposes, as a reason the team does not need to do the configuration and validations manually.
  • Configured cluster, failover cluster, troubleshoot cluster issues, add/delete resources, and service groups.
  • Provided support to numerous applications at the same time to maintain all the applications running without any problems and ensure health.
  • Built the non-productive and production-like environments likewise configured to the latest versions.
  • Set up elastic load balancers for distributed traffic and applied emergency fixes among multiple WebLogic servers.
  • Managed the entire release communication and release coordination during the project roll-out.

• “Champion of the Quarter (QF3 & QF4 - 2025)” – EMEA Region for exceptional contributions in automation and process improvement.
  • Received 25+ positive feedbacks from peers and managers for innovation, ownership, and consistent delivery.
  • Independently resolved high-impact incidents, including the CrowdStrike issue and a complete database drop, preventing customer downtime.
  • Presented automation solutions to upper management and during internal tech webinars, promoting best practices and knowledge sharing.

frontmatter.title: 3AK Pharma : An Integrated Cloud Based HealthCare Solution

node.html: The web application makes use of a publicly available REST-API named Auth0 for authentication and self-developed API foraccess management. We have deployed our web application on Amazon Web services AWS Beanstalk platform and have also provisioned a full life-cycle CICD pipeline for the purpose of quick delivery and deployment of changes.

frontmatter.title: SARS-CoV-2 Pandemic Analysis and Prediction using Cloud based Machine Learning Models

node.html: we have implemented a time series forecasting Projection which makes scientific predictions based on historical time stamped data. We have devised a number of algorithms like Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), Prophet Model, Pattern Evaluation to accurately forecast the future of the pandemic. The project displays the data in form of graphs and charts making it more meaningful and understandable. This information is of essential importance for pandemic planning and mitigation strategies.

frontmatter.title: Stock Investment Tool for Cloud Platform Programming

node.html: In this project we have not used any API to get the market data, instead, we created a few random stocks and functionally act as an actual stock market. This will guide the beginner or an investor to jump into the stock market and analyze their profits and losses. This web application is a simulation of the trading activity, where the graph of the share is viewable. Also, after successful buying and selling of the stock, users’ holdings would be updated accordingly in graphical format. Because of this, the user can analyze the performance of his trading activity in a share market simulation.

The ERC20 compliant ethereum token is generated consisting of 1 million tokens, the same token having 18 decimal places, also the token having a given name and the description. The distribution of the 5% of the total 1 million supply of the token is made to the 10 accounts through the Ropsten test net network.
My inbox is never closed. Whether you have a question or simply want to say hi, I will do my best to respond! Please notify me of any relevant job updates.
